description: Ask questions about your data and validate the results on generated data.
examples: I have generated sample data based on your information. I will run the query on these samples.
after_examples: You can modify this examples and upload them back.
result: Here are the results on the generated examples.
empty_table: No items found in the current table.

queries.example1: Show me the total sales for last month.
queries.example2: List all orders that were delivered this week.
queries.example3: What are the top 5 products by revenue?
queries.example4: Give me a breakdown of sales by category.
queries.example5: How many new customers did we acquire last quarter?

loading.fixing_query: Query compilation failed, trying to fix query
loading.empty_results: Query returned 0 result, trying to add new examples ...

generate.page_title: Generate tests from a SQL query
generate.page_subtitle: Choose a query from your local models.
generate.mode_integration_tooltip: Coming soon — we'll let you know.

profiling.title: Optional profiling
profiling.description: MockSQL can automatically run profiling on your columns. This <bold>improves the accuracy of generated tests</bold> by providing a better understanding of the actual data distribution.
profiling.billing_info: This operation will scan approximately <bold>{{tb}} TB</bold> of data

model.no_sessions: No test sessions for this model.

verdict.text_complete: The query produced results on this input data. The test is valid.
verdict.text_empty_expected: The query returned no rows, matching the expected behavior. The test is valid.
verdict.text_empty_unexpected: The query returned no rows. Check that the input data actually triggers the expected computation path.
verdict.text_error: The query failed on this data. Inspect the input data or the SQL query.

panel.no_more_suggestions: No more valid suggestions for now.
panel.regenerate_prompt: Want to regenerate a fresh batch?
panel.refresh_tooltip: Re-scans the schema and profile of the source tables (not a page reload, and does not re-run tests)

footer.transpiled: Your {{dialect}} queries are transpiled and executed on DuckDB
footer.generate_footer: Runs locally on DuckDB — zero {{dialect}} cost

chatcol.hint_instruction: An instruction steers the generation; a question gets answered without touching it
chatcol.hint_send: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a new line

import.missing_title: Tables not found in the local index
import.intro_before: MockSQL transpiles your {{dialect}} query and runs it locally on
import.intro_after: — no query is ever billed on {{dialect}}. Only the schema is imported.
import.importing_note: Import in progress — tests will start automatically when it finishes.
import.card_local_desc: DuckDB runs the query on your machine. No real data ever leaves your infra.
import.card_zero_desc: No query ever reaches {{dialect}} — iterate freely with zero billing surprises.
import.card_synth_desc: Only the schema is imported. Test values are generated — zero prod data leakage.

genpopup.how_many: How many tests do you want to generate up front? MockSQL builds the happy-path test first, then chains the next ones from cases not yet covered.
genpopup.eta_launches_one: This can take ~{{count}} minute — keep this tab open (you can switch to something else), I'll notify you as soon as it's done.
genpopup.eta_launches_other: This can take ~{{count}} minutes — keep this tab open (you can switch to something else), I'll notify you as soon as it's done.
genpopup.eta_pending_one: This will take ~{{count}} minute. One last confirmation step remains before launch.
genpopup.eta_pending_other: This will take ~{{count}} minutes. One last confirmation step remains before launch.

delete_confirmation_text: Are you sure you want to delete this Model?
no_tables: No tables added yet. Use the uploader or add tables manually.
mark_source_full: Add this model as a source
unmark_source_full: No longer consider this model as a source
